$comment: GENERATED by github.com/lnorton89/golc/internal/contracts. DO NOT EDIT. Schema: linear-plan.

conflicts.description: Blocked D-13 field disagreements; a local id recorded here never also owns an operation.

oneOf.description: Last-synchronized baseline value this field's D-13 three-way comparison is anchored to.

field.description: Owned field name both sides changed away from the last synchronized baseline.

local_id.description: Durable local id with a blocked D-13 field disagreement.

resolution_command.description: Exact command a contributor runs to explicitly resolve this conflict.

intent_digest.description: SHA-256 digest of the sorted repository intent set this plan was computed from.

mapping_digest.description: SHA-256 digest of the sorted credential-free remote mapping set this plan was computed from.

operations.description: Planned mutations in the fixed D-17 hierarchy/local-id order; never reordered after generation.

after.description: Canonically encoded desired repository-owned field values after this operation.

before.description: Canonically encoded observed remote owned-field values before this operation; empty when unobserved.

depends_on.description: Parent local id(s) that must already be complete or linked before this operation may run.

discovery_marker.description: Exact D-14 identity footer this operation's remote object must carry.

oneOf.description: Captured remote updated_at precondition; null when no prior observation exists.

kind.description: Catalog kind; the repository-root project kind is never remote-managed and never appears here.

linear_type.description: Target Linear object type this local id maps to.

oneOf.description: Already-linked immutable Linear UUID; null for a not-yet-linked operation discovered by marker instead (D-14).

local_id.description: Durable local id this operation mutates; identity never changes on rename (D-14).

owned_fields.description: Sorted repository-owned field names this operation may write; never a Linear-owned operational field (D-11).

parent_local_id.description: Structural parent local id; empty only for a top-level milestone operation.

plan_id.description: SHA-256 digest binding this plan's own canonical body; plan_id equals sha256(canonical_body).

remote_scope_digest.description: SHA-256 digest of the sorted exhaustively captured remote observation scope this plan was computed from.

schema_version.description: Fixed reconcile.SchemaVersion this plan was built under.
